lines: Abo mur'iyi si mbi Bifuza kwinezeza, Kand' iteka bifuza Icyubahiro.
Bishwe n'Umurimbuzi, Abagir' imbata ze, Yanga ko bameny' uko Yes' abatura.
Igomwa rya Satani, Ajya yoshy' abantu be Abahemukir' atyo, Akabata pe.
Naho bamutakira, Ntabwo yabarengera; No ku munsi w'imanza Ntazabafasha !
Ajy'ashuk' abant' atyo, Ngw abate mu muriro, Ngw atebon' iryo shyano,Ari
Mana, turakwinginze, Ubahumur' amaso, Ngo bahung' umuriro, Bagutakire !
Wa Mukiza wacu we, Umva, turakwinginga : Ngwin' utwigishe neza Kubaburira.
Nuko, turabinginze, Uk' Umwuka w'Imana Abategetse kose,
